caption: A woman with blonde-highlighted hair tied up and wearing black headphones is seated in a studio setting. She wears a black t-shirt featuring a white circular logo on the chest. In front of her is a professional black microphone on a stand. To her left, a screen displays the name "Johnson" in red text above a graphic. On the wall behind her, there is a yellow vertical stripe and a sign that reads "Employee Only". On-screen graphics include a logo that says "BOSS TALK 101" and another that says "PODCAST" under a microphone icon. Across the sequence of frames, the woman maintains a consistent posture and a slight smile, looking off-camera to her left. The scene remains static with minimal movement, showing her listening or preparing to speak during a recording session.
